hero.desc: AOC rum, tokenized real estate, certified harvests, Creole art. Tokenized on XRP Ledger. Accessible from €100, from anywhere in the world.

rhum.desc: Aged rum barrels maturing in ancestral cellars. AOC certified, rare, uncorrelated.

immo.desc: Tourist villas, commercial premises with lease. Rental income distributed monthly.

agri.desc: IGP banana, Bonifieur coffee, cocoa, Guyanese FSC forest. Financing real harvests.

art.desc: Co-own works by recognized Caribbean artists. Automatic royalties on every resale.

how.step1_desc: Browse our selection of verified Caribbean assets: rum, real estate, agriculture, art.
how.step2_desc: Our simulator calculates your projections in real time across 3 scenarios.
how.step3_desc: KYC, dedicated SPV, insured assets, XRPL blockchain. Your capital is protected.
how.step4_desc: Automatic distributions to your wallet. Resell your tokens at any time.

vision.label: Our vision
vision.desc: 35 countries, 40 million inhabitants, unique assets. CaribbeanVault connects Caribbean producers to a global community of investors.

cta.label: Join us
cta.desc: Get early access to available assets and the Caribbean investor community. From €100, from anywhere in the world.

dashboard.desc: Your CaribbeanVault investor space. Explore our assets and track your journey.
dashboard.kyc_desc: Our team is reviewing your file. You will receive a confirmation email within 48 hours.
dashboard.etape1_desc: Our team validates your profile within 48h
dashboard.etape2_desc: An advisor will contact you to personalize your strategy
dashboard.etape4_desc: Select your first asset and invest
dashboard.simulateur_desc: Calculate your projections over 1, 3 or 5 years based on your amount and asset.
